title: senecio iljinii
intro: Senecio iljinii, also known as Iljin's ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio iljinii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Senecio iljinii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
